title: KandyToys Doll Styling Head Playset with Accessories | 3 Designs to Collect
features: Get styling and and creating with our KandyToys dolls head hair styling playset with accessories.
Learn how to style hair with this styling model - A lovely gift for budding young hairdressers! The hair is soft and easy to work with. Which styles can you create?
The playset includes - Doll styling head, coloured extensions, hair clips, hair bands, comb, model hair dryer, model scissors, model make up pieces.
Assorted doll styles available - 1 will be sent at random.
description: Fantastic Dolls Head Styling Model & Accessories Playset Includes: 21cm styling head 1x hairdryer 1x comb 1x mirror 1x scissors 2x hair bobbles 2x hair clips 2x coloured hair extensions 1x lipstick 1x mascara Please note: Hair colour may vary.
